markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, review processes, and holiday schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Ready for Launch:** Four articles are staged in Webflow for the Dec 22 website launch. Vizcom feedback is minor (tone, product names), confirming the content's quality.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**New Review Workflow:** An Airtable automation will notify reviewers (Kim, Sophia, Maura, Chris) when articles are ready, streamlining the process.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [**Infographic Style Guide:** A Figma presentation will be provided to guide Nano Banana's AI-generated visuals, ensuring brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:** GrowthX will deliver content during the Dec 26–Jan 2 week, but publishing will pause until Vizcom returns on Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Feedback

  - [**Vizcom Feedback:** Minor revisions are needed for four articles staged in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [**Tone:** Reframe designer AI adoption from "obvious" to "curious" or "exploring" to reflect varied customer sentiment (apprehension vs. quick adoption).](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [**Nomenclature:** Ensure all product and feature names are correct.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**GrowthX Process (Atlas):** Aida demoed the Atlas platform to show how feedback is integrated.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** AI pulls from `Company Context`, `Audience Personas`, `Writing Guidelines`, and `Products & Services` (for fact-checking).](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Pipeline:** An "agentic" workflow (research, draft, self-evaluation) ensures depth and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
          - [**Research:** Tavoli (or EXA for complex topics) generates questions → answers are compiled into a comprehensive research doc.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
          - [**Fact-Checking:** EXA verifies each passage; unverified claims are removed or rewritten.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [**Case Studies:** Vizcom will provide case studies for a new Atlas artifact to ensure consistent, organic reference in future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Sources:** Community spotlights and new enterprise examples.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Feature Deep Dive:** The "Modify" feature is a strong candidate for a future deep dive, as it is the most-used feature among enterprise customers.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

### Visuals & Infographics

  - [**Goal:** Create both featured images and inline infographics for articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Process:** Nano Banana's AI generates infographics from article content.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Action:** Sophia will provide a Figma presentation from Brooke (Head of Product Design) to serve as a style guide, ensuring brand consistency and accelerating Maura's review.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Review Workflow & Holiday Schedule

  - [**New Review Process:** An Airtable automation will notify reviewers via email when a draft is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [**Reviewers:** Kim, Sophia, Maura, and potentially Chris (pending bandwidth confirmation).](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [**Completion:** Reviewers will add a "reviewed" comment in the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Online but no meetings Dec 26–Jan 2.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [**Vizcom:** Off Dec 24–Jan 2; most staff return Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [**Plan:** GrowthX will deliver content as normal; publishing will pause until Vizcom's return. The Dec 27 sync is canceled.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sophia:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

  - [**Kim:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Share community spotlight case studies for the new Atlas artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**Aida (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Stage the 4 approved articles in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Set up the Airtable review notification automation.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [Deliver 5 additional articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Maura (Vizcom):**](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [Review all article images by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HCU4Lyxnx3Fi-yx9gmsGZGSNJ5oDqwPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
